I agree with the consensus that the double wedge technique is optimal for wide buccolingual cavities, but I want to add another point. The double wedge technique not only ensures better retention due to multiple points of contact but also helps in achieving a more uniform distribution of biting force throughout the restored area, reducing the chance of fracture along weak spots.
